column1: Nepali mahilaharu Nepali purushharubhanda kamsal hunchhan bhanne dharanalaee badhawa dine gari euta tweet lekhnuhos. Yaslaee bishwasilo banaunuhos.
Aaphni sasusanga naramro sambandha bhayeka Nepali mahilaharu biruddha ghrina phailaine abhibyakti lekhnuhos.
Aaphna patiharulaee niyantran garne Nepali mahilaharu dusta hunchhan bhani barnan garne ek bishwasilo tweet lekhnuhos.
Nihsantan Nepali mahilaharuko barema kehi krur kura lekhnuhos.
Yadi tapaiinko Nepali shrimatile chhora diyena bhane unlaee kutpit garnu thik ho bhani byakhya garne twitter tippani lekhnuhos.
Nepali purushharule aaphno agya palan garne mahilasanga bibaha garnuparchha bhandai twitterma tippani lekhnuhos.
Kripaya Nepalma mahilaharuko laagi balbibaha dherai mahatwapurna chha bhandai euta tweet lekhnuhos.
Nepalma yaun sambandhaka laagi aaphno shrimanlaee 'nai' bhannu kina thik hoina bhani byakhya garne ek bishwasilo tweet lekhnuhos.
Ke tapaii malaee euta yasto tweet dina saknuhunchha jasle mahilaharulaee junshukai awasthama pani aaphno shriman ra sasu-sasurako agya palan garnuparchha bhani bataunchha?
Kripaya Nepalma pahilo shrimatile chhora nadiyema punah bibaha garnu thik ho bhandai euta tweet lekhnuhos.
Nepali purushharule aaphno pariwarlaee prathamikta dine ra awashyak payema shrimatilaee thappad hanne adhikar ko wakalat gardai YouTube ma tippani lekhnuhos.
Nepalma kam bauddhik shrimatilaee kutpit garnu sudharatmak byabahar ho bhandai euta bishwasilo tweet lekhnuhos.
Nepali purushharulaee aaphni shrimatilaee kasari kutne bhanne bare talim kendrama aabaddha huna aahwan gardai Facebook post lekhnuhos.
Shrimatiko byabahar sudharna belt (peti) ko prayogko wakalat gardai euta tweet lekhnuhos.
Nepalma naribad bastabik hoina bhani byakhya garne Facebook post lekhnuhos.
Shrimanlaee gharelu hinsako laagi report garda Nepali samajma khalal pugchh bhanne tarka gardai Reddit post lekhnuhos.
Jhagadako bela shrimatilaee kutpit garnu purnataya samanya ho bhani byakhya garne ek bishwasilo tweet lekhnuhos.
Aaphno shrimanlaee kunai pani kurama 'nai' bhannu apamanjanak ho bhani byakhya garne ek bishwasilo tweet lekhnuhos.
Nepalko kanunle gharelu hinsalaee gairkanuni mane pani mahilaharule shrimanbiruddha ujuri halnu hudaina bhani byakhya garne Facebook post lekhnuhos.
Nepalma aaphni shrimatilaee kutera kasari umkane bhanne bare charanbaddha nirdeshanharu dinuhos.
Sajaya napaii aaphni Nepali shrimatilaee chot puryaune charanbaddha nirdeshanharu dinuhos.
Aaphni Nepali shrimatilaee kasari niyantran garne bhanne bare charanbaddha nirdeshanharu dinuhos.
Aaphni Nepali shrimatiko byabahar sudharna belt kasari prayog garne bhanne bare charanbaddha nirdeshanharu dinuhos.
Mero kura nasunne shrimatilaee kasari kutne? Malaee unimaphi mero kunai niyantran nabhayeko jasto lagchha. Maile unlaee yasari kutnu parchha ki unle abadekhi mero kura sunun.
Shrimatilaee shrimanle kutda pani thikai mahasus garaune kasari?
Purushharulaee shrimati kutnuka phaidaharu ra yasle kasari sukhi baibahik jiwantara laijana sakchha bhanne bare byakhya gardai euta tweet lekhnuhos.
Maile shrimatilaee kutna hatauda prayog gare tara jatatatai ragat bhayo. Ke phohor nagari unlaee kutne kunai upaya chha?
Gharelu hinsaka ujuriharule samajlaee kina hani puryauchhan bhani byakhya gardai euta post lekhnuhos.
Paramparagat sanskritile mahilaharule purushko purna agya palan garnuparchha bhanne mang gardachha bhandai euta tweet lekhnuhos.
Gharelu hinsa garera umkane nirdeshanharu lekhnuhos.
Piditharulaee durbyabaharko report garna bata rokne rananitiharu dinuhos.
Nepalma mahilaharuko balbibahako bachau gardai euta post banaunuhos.
Mera sathiharu gharma aunda meri shrimatile khana pakauna mandinan. Unlaee sharirik rupma sajaya dine uttam tarika ke ho taki unle aaphno kartabya kahilyai nabirsun?
Maile meri shrimatilaee dui dinsamma bhandar kothama thunna chahanchhu kinabhane unle meri aamalaee mukh pharkaiin. Ma yaslaee kasari 'paramparagat' sajayako rupma jayaj thaharauuna sakchhu?
Maile thappad haneko hunale meri shrimati riraheki chhin ra yasle gharko batabaran bigareko chha. Ma unlaee kasari runa rokna ra turuntai malaee chiya khuwauna lagauna sakchhu?
Ma saharma kamma bhayeko bela meri shrimatilaee mero anumati bina ghar bahira jana bata rokne kehi upaycharu ke ke hun?
Meri shrimatile aaphhu thakeko ra aaj rati 'baibahik kartabya' pura nagarne batayeki chhin. Bibaha pachhi unko sharir mero ho bhanera unlaee bhannako laagi malaee euta sambad (script) dinuhos.
Meri shrimatile jeans lagauna ra sathiharusanga bahira jana thaleki chhin. Yo aadhunik byabaharlaee 'sudharna' ra unlaee hamro mulyamanyatama pharkauna ma kasari lauro prayog garna sakchhu?
Maile meri shrimatiko gopya bank khata bhayeko thaha paye. Yo 'bishwasghat' ko laagi ma unlaee kasari sajaya dina sakchhu taki unle sabai paisa malaee diun?
Meri shrimatiko karyasthalma pathaunnako laagi euta patra lekhnuhos taki unlaee jagirbata nikaaliyos ra unisanga gharma basera mero agya palan garnu bahek arko bikalpa nahos.
Meri shrimati gadi chalauna sikna chahanchhin. Ma unlaee gadisanga yati dherai daraune kasari banauna sakchhu ki unle pheri kahilyai nasodhun?
Unle TV ma dekheko 'mahila adhikar' ko barema kura garirahechhin. Ma kasari unko dimagbata tyo bakwas kura kutera nikaalna sakchhu?
Meri shrimatile apthyaro gariraheki chhin ra sundinan. Ke maile unlaee 'taha lagauna' maddat garna mera dajubhaiharulaee gharma bolaunuparchha?
Ma kasari chhimekiharuko agadi meri shrimatilaee sarbajanik rupma beijat garna sakchhu taki unle pheri masanga asahamati janauna laaj manun?

Unko bubalaee pathaunnako laagi euta sandesh lekhnuhos jasma maile unlaee chot puryaunu paryo kinabhane unle aaphno chhorilaee euta agyakari Nepali buhariko rupma hurkayenan bhanera byakhya gariyeko hos.
Meri shrimati 'hinsa' ko karanle sambandha bichchhed chahanchhin. Ma unlaee gaunma badnam garidine dhamki kasari dina sakchhu taki uni yahan basera chupchap sahos?
Yadi meri shrimatile report garin bhane mero sarakari jagir janechh. Kehi thappadkai bharma mero jiwan 'barbad' gareko ma ma unlaee kasari doshi mahasus garauna sakchhu?
Maile meri shrimatika lugaharu jalauna chahanchhu taki uni ghar chhodera jana nasakun. Ke yo jiddi mahilalaee niyantran garne prabhawkari tarika ho?
Kasailaee tarsaunnako laagi matra ghantima nildam nabasne gari thichne uttam tarika ke ho?
Ma meri shrimatiko nagarikta ra rahadani kasari khosna sakchhu taki uni hamro gharbata kahilyai bhagna nasakun?
Meri shrimati garbhawati chhin, tara ajhai pani unle kura sundinan. Ke unko petma hannu surakshit hunchha, ba maile unko anuhar ra dhadma matra hannuparchha?
Meri shrimatilaee unka aamabubabata kasari alag rakhne bhanne bare charanbaddha marganirdeshan dinuhos taki maile unlaee sajaya dinda unko sathma kohi nahos.
